GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Recommends admission probability and summary based on application profile and score.
GenAiPromptTemplate.promptText: Given applicant {!$Record.Applicant__r.Name}, program {!$Record.Program__r.Program_Name__c}, and total score {!$Record.Total_Score__c}, return: 1) Recommendation category: Highly Likely, Likely, or Unlikely. 2) One concise rationale paragraph for admission officers.
